gaps: The ranged corpus backend could not resolve its remote host, so no similar priors were returned.
The CourtListener MCP search required an unavailable session store.
The committed statpack lacked the modern discretionary-cert section named in the prediction prompt.
helpful: The provisioned snapshot exposed the Court-requested response and the unusually large amicus showing.
The complete petition and extracted questions presented made the doctrinal and vehicle analysis possible.
The committed statpack provided a broad rarity check despite its limited resolved sample.
notes: The prediction could be completed from the provisioned record, but all live retrieval attempts failed and the most relevant statpack cut was absent.
